name: context7
description: Up-to-date library and API documentation for Codex via Context7 MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch current library/API docs during coding tasks
interface.longDescription: Context7 brings up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples into Codex through MCP. Use it for library APIs, setup instructions, migrations, and framework-specific examples.
defaultPrompt: Use Context7 for the latest Next.js docs
